ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data was collected */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given year */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the demographic data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the demographic data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the demographic data */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the year entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the year entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the year entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the year entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ethnicity is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the ethnicity entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ethnicity entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the ethnicity entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the ethnicity entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_breakdown" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic breakdown */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnicity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the given ethnicity for the given year */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population for the given ethnicity */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the demographic breakdown entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic breakdown entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the demographic breakdown entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic breakdown entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_breakdown_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_breakdown_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the user entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the role entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the access entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the access entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data source entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the data source entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the collection method is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the collection method entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection method entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the collection method entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the collection method entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data format is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the data format entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data format entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the data format entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data format entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the version entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the version entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the note is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the note entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the note entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_notes_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "quality_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the quality entry is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the quality entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the quality entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the validation entry is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the validation entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the validation entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log entry is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the log entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
